Term Sheet — Strategic Investment in VietNexa Holdings JSC by Aurora Growth Capital LP
Parties: VietNexa Holdings JSC (issuer) and Aurora Growth Capital LP (investor); contact: dealroom@auroragrowthcapital.asia
Transaction: Subscription of VND-denominated preferred shares representing 12% post-money, with a call option to acquire an additional 3% upon milestone completion.
Pricing: Pre-money valuation VND 1,250,000,000,000; share price VND 85,000; closing targeted within 45 days subject to Vietnamese Securities Law and corporate approvals.
Conditions precedent: Board and shareholder approvals, local law filings, and no trading halt triggers under Vietnamese Securities Law; no rights of first refusal outstanding.
MNPI handling: No MNPI will be shared during diligence; analysis relies on publicly available disclosures and anonymized KPIs; if any price-sensitive draft is produced, pre-clearance and logging in the MNPI Register is mandatory.
Data Processing Addendum: Schedule D attached; retention tag RET-12M applies to investor relations datasets; minimisation requires collection of business email, role, and corporate phone only.
Cross-border transfer: Data-Export Approval DEA-26-041 authorizes export of onboarding forms to a Singapore cloud region with field masking; exporter contact privacy@vietnexa.vn; transfer limited to investor relations and payroll tools.
DSAR and erasure: DSAR #VNX-DS-119 received 17 May 2026; payroll metadata for employee records anonymized and erasure completed 20 May 2026; confirmation sent to ms.quynh.nguyen@vietnexa.vn.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Nguyen Thi Quynh withdrew consent on 02 Jun 2026 for optional wellness programme data; processing ceased and audit tag CONSENT-WD-2026-07 applied; no further use is permitted.
Completed control (negated risk): Offshore log shipping to non-Vietnam regions was disabled in June 2024; this is a completed control and does not indicate any current cross-border leakage.
Funding mechanics: Proceeds to VietNexa escrow at Saigon Meridian Bank, Account 0039281-77; authorized signatory Mr. Tran Bao Linh; contact linhtb@saigonmeridian.com; tel +84 28 9900 4411.
Investor onboarding: Aurora Growth Capital LP onboarding form captures name, role, and business email; KYC verification performed by BaoLam Securities Co.; no government ID copies retained beyond salted hash; minimisation verified by Compliance Memo Ref CM-2026-08.
Listing context: VietNexa intends to seek a Vietnamese exchange listing in Q4 2026; internal compliance memo dated 02 Jun 2026 confirms that no public announcement has been made and the term sheet omits price-sensitive figures.
Subprocessors: Skylark Cloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) included in DPA Schedule; clauses adapted to Decree 13; DSAR portal for all data subjects: https://privacy.vietnexa.vn.
Policy-only statement: Template clause 7.3 (“we always encrypt at rest and never transfer abroad”) is superseded by approved DEA-26-041; the clause is informational and should not be read as a live control.
Execution: Signatories — Ms. Le Thi Mai (DPO, VietNexa Holdings JSC) and Mr. Do Van Kiet (Partner, Aurora Growth Capital LP); issuer contact: corpsec@vietnexa.vn.
